founder.name: Elena Rossi
founder.bio: Registered nurse, 12 years in NHS discharge coordination. First-time, non-technical founder. No code, no funding, no network.

company.name: CareLoop
company.one_liner: Discharge follow-up coordination to cut avoidable hospital readmissions.

content.title: The readmission nobody owns: what I saw at discharge
content.summary: First-hand account of why patients bounce back within 30 days and where the coordination handoff breaks. Deep, specific domain insight.

content.note: Cold-start: no GitHub, no funding, no technical co-founder yet. Only asset is exceptional domain insight and access to two hospital discharge teams willing to pilot.
